text:
Once upon a time, in the heart of a lush, enchanted forest, there was a small, yet magnificent lake named Whispering Waters. The water was so clear that it reflected the colorful spectrum of flowers and trees that surrounded it. In this magical setting lived Qwen, a graceful and gentle spirit who could transform into any bird she desired.

Qwen had always been fascinated by the stories of a rare and beautiful bird called the Sunlit Feather, which was said to sing a melody that could heal even the deepest wounds of the soul. However, the Sunlit Feather was very elusive and lived far beyond the borders of her forest.

One day, a young human girl named Lily wandered into the forest, her heart heavy with sorrow after the loss of her grandmother. She stumbled upon Whispering Waters, and as she knelt beside the lake, tears streaming down her face, she caught sight of Qwen perched on a branch above her.
